title: dactylorhiza × carnea nothosubsp. maculatiformis
intro: Dactylorhiza × carnea nothosubsp. maculatiformis is a hybrid orchid plant resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Dactylorhiza fuchsii, belonging to the Orchidaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza × carnea nothosubsp. maculatiformis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments.
